ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal in centimeters */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal in centimeters */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species classification */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the measurement */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat where the species is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant family */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the family */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the genus belongs to */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the genus */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the imported dataset */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was imported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the dataset */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (success, failure, in progress) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the exported dataset */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the dataset */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (success, failure, in progress) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement for which the prediction was made */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "predicted_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted species */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that used the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement used for training */,
  "label_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species label for the training data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., field data, historical data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_label_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement used for the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, histogram) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* File path where the visualization is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
